arts.ttl: Aleksandar Pavlović inspired to follow Thomas Müller’s Bayern Munich example
arts.sum: That would be Bavaria-born duo Aleksandar Pavlović and Thomas Müller, who featured together for an event for Bayern Munich’s club magazine for the occasion of the its 125th anniversary. “Thomas is simply unique, already an absolute legend of the club, a huge figure of identification for every fan and also for me as a player,” Pavlović said as part of his interview alongside Müller in Säbener 51 (as captured via @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Harry Kane tipped to make surprise Arsenal transfer after cut-price release clause emerges
arts.sum: Harry Kane joined Bayern Munich 18 months ago, but is already being linked with a move back to the Premier League after it emerged he has a release clause in his contract

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 30: Assessing Bayern Munich’s hellacious February schedule; Harry Kane has a release clause, let’s discuss; Is Bayern failing its young players?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Let’s take a look at the treacherous terrain that lies ahead of Bayern Munich this month. Bayern Munich has a massive month ahead of it...

arts.ttl: Barcelona monitor Bayern Munich star for remainder of 2024-25 season
arts.sum: Barcelona are gearing up for a busy summer. Now that they are back within La Liga’s 1:1 rule, they will find it easier to sign players, and the intention is to add a few players to Hansi Flick’s squad before the start of the 2025-26 season, which kicks off in August. arts.ttl: Mathys Tel was ready to join Marseille before choosing Premier League move
arts.sum: According to a report from RMC Sport journalist Fabrice Hawkins, Mathys Tel (19) was at one stage ready to join Olympique de Marseille during the winter transfer window. Marseille had…

arts.ttl: Barcelona keeping a close eye on on-loan Bayern Munich starlet
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona will be keeping a watchful eye on the performances of Bayern Munich youngster Adam Aznou at Real Valladolid over the 2nd half of the season. That’s…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Werder Bremen preview: Munich look to extended their lead at the top of the Bundesliga standings
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be heavy favorites going into Friday night’s contest, but this Bremen side has won at the Allianz before.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Werder Bremen: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch & more!
arts.sum: Werder Bremen will be looking to win consecutive matches in Munich since 2004. Werder Bremen has only defeated Bayern Munich once in the last 34 meetings, however that upset victory occurred at the Allianz Arena last season.

arts.ttl: The story of Spurs' Mathys Tel
arts.sum: When Tel captained France to victory at the UEFA European Under-17 Championship in 2022, there were two fellow members of the Rennes academy alongside him in the starting line-up in their 2-1 win over the Netherlands in the final - defender Jeanuel Belocian, now at Bayer Leverkusen, and attacking midfielder Desire Doue, who joined Paris Saint-Germain last year. In August 2021, when Tel became the youngest player ever to appear in a professional match for Rennes, aged just 16 years and 110 days old, breaking the record set by Eduardo Camavinga, who had joined Rennes at the age of 11.

arts.ttl: Jonas Urbig reveals his idols to be Manuel Neuer and...Iker Casillas?
arts.sum: New Bayern Munich goalkeeper Jonas Urbig has a big task on his hands, as it seems he will join a list of players aiming to become the successor to legendary goalkeeper Manuel Neuer. However, Urbig mentioned another name in his list of idols: “Obviously Manuel Neuer inspired me.
